Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}When I see this place, I remember all the times I'd come here with Maiko...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}She came here when she ran away from home, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}She really loved the takoyaki...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}She's a good girl, wouldn't you agree?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}She's so good that I wonder if she's really my own child sometimes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Oh... Were you not that close? Well, I thought I'd at least let you know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}She actually sent me a letter recently.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}It's chock-full of details about her new life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}She said she's made a lot of friends.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Let's see... She's in charge of the rabbits at her new school, and has had to get up early to clean the cages.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}They scolded her for forgetting her P.E. uniform... She forgot her homework and had to copy a friend's...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}I guess she can be a bit absentminded. I never knew that about her...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Oh, and she did so well on her recorder test that she was asked to perform in front of everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_2_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Then she went on to talk about how she plays at the park by the school with her friends every day...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Her mother's doing well, too. They're having a lot of fun together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Nowadays, I just come home to an empty house... The rooms feel so big without those two around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I wonder if she feels the same way, living in a home with no father in it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}We put her through so much because of our own problems...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}I feel terrible about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}By the way... I've actually got a bone to pick with you too![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Maiko must have really liked you, huh? She wrote all about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}"I can't wait to grow up!"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}"That's why I'm drinking lots of milk."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}"I'm going to marry him someday!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}What the hell is that about, you little punk!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Y-You were taking advantage of my little Maiko, weren't you!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Maybe I haven't been the best dad, b-but I'm still her father, dammit![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}And I'm not letting a guy like you touch my daughter with a ten-foot pole![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}I-I'll never let you marry her! And don't you forget it![n]{f 1 1}
